channel.title: Setup on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Setup on ❯ DineshKumar's Blog

item.title: Setting Up Your Linux System: A Step-by-Step Guide
item.description:
Introduction

Congratulations on choosing Linux as your operating system! Setting up your Linux system can seem daunting, but with this step-by-step guide, you’ll be up and running in no time. In this post, we’ll cover the basics of setting up a Linux system, including installing essential packages, configuring networking, and securing your system.

item.title: Git Setup: First Time Configuration Guide
item.description:
Git Setup (First Time)

Prerequisite - Hope the Git tool is installed on your system, if not please download & install platform specific from git-scm.
